name: @plannotator/pi-extension
description: Plannotator extension for Pi coding agent - interactive plan review with visual annotation
author: backnotprop

scripts.build: cp ../hook/dist/index.html plannotator.html && cp ../hook/dist/review.html review-editor.html && for f in feedback-templates review-core storage draft project; do src="../../packages/shared/$f.ts"; printf '// @generated — DO NOT EDIT. Source: packages/shared/%s.ts\n' "$f" | cat - "$src" > "$f.ts"; done
